action_mappings.unenroll_toggle_dependency: unenroll release {} from toggle dependency feature toggle {}

action_mappings.unenroll_integration_dependency: unenroll release {} from integration dependency integration bundle {}

action_mappings_indef.prepare_stage_with_validation_artifact: prepare stage for a release {} using a validation artifact {}

action_mappings_indef.unenroll_toggle_dependency: unenroll a release {} from toggle dependency a feature toggle {}

action_mappings_indef.unenroll_integration_dependency: unenroll a release {} from integration dependency an integration bundle {}

action_mappings_indef.execute_integration_with_migration: execute integration with migration for a release {} in a target environment {} using a feature toggle {} and a migration job {}

predicate_mappings.release_wave_enrolled: {} is enrolled in the release wave
predicate_mappings.release_stage_prepared: {} is prepared for the release stage
predicate_mappings.release_bound_integration: {} is bound to the integration bundle {}
predicate_mappings.release_policy_anchor_binding: {} has a policy anchor binding to {}
predicate_mappings.release_policy_applied: {} has the release policy applied from {}
predicate_mappings.release_stage_ready: {} is ready for the release stage

predicate_mappings.release_compatible_with_integration: {} is compatible with the integration bundle {}

predicate_mappings.release_bound_group: {} is bound to the deployment group {}

register_release.description: register a release A as a registered release
preconditions: I can only register a release A as a registered release if it is not the case that A is a registered release and it is not the case that A has been finalized for release
effects: Once I register a release A as a registered release, it is the case that A is a registered release

assign_release_to_wave.description: assign a release A to a deployment wave B
preconditions: I can only assign a release A to a deployment wave B if it is the case that A is a registered release and B is available for deployment and A is compatible with the deployment wave B
I can only assign a release A to a deployment wave B if it is not the case that A is enrolled in the release wave
effects: Once I assign a release A to a deployment wave B, it is the case that A is assigned to deployment wave B and A is enrolled in the release wave
Once I assign a release A to a deployment wave B, it is not the case anymore that B is available for deployment

revoke_release_from_wave.description: revoke a release A from a deployment wave B
preconditions: I can only revoke a release A from a deployment wave B if it is the case that A is assigned to deployment wave B
I can only revoke a release A from a deployment wave B if it is not the case that A is promotable and it is not the case that A is approved
effects: Once I revoke a release A from a deployment wave B, it is the case that B is available for deployment

Once I revoke a release A from a deployment wave B, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to deployment wave B and it is not the case anymore that A is enrolled in the release wave and it is not the case anymore that A is prepared for the release stage and it is not the case anymore that A is validated for release and it is not the case anymore that A requires migration before release and it is not the case anymore that A has been promoted and it is not the case anymore that A has pending checks

bind_release_to_deployment_group.description: bind a release A to a deployment group B
preconditions: I can only bind a release A to a deployment group B if it is the case that A is a registered release and B is available
effects: Once I bind a release A to a deployment group B, it is the case that A is bound to the deployment group B
Once I bind a release A to a deployment group B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unbind_release_from_deployment_group.description: unbind a release A from a deployment group B
preconditions: I can only unbind a release A from a deployment group B if it is the case that A is bound to the deployment group B
effects: Once I unbind a release A from a deployment group B, it is the case that B is available
Once I unbind a release A from a deployment group B, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the deployment group B

prepare_stage_for_group.description: prepare stage for a release A in a deployment group B
preconditions: I can only prepare stage for a release A in a deployment group B if it is the case that A is a registered release and A is enrolled in the release wave and A is bound to the deployment group B
I can only prepare stage for a release A in a deployment group B if it is not the case that A is prepared for the release stage
effects: Once I prepare stage for a release A in a deployment group B, it is the case that A is prepared for the release stage

prepare_stage_with_validation_artifact.description: prepare stage for a release A using a validation artifact B
preconditions: I can only prepare stage for a release A using a validation artifact B if it is the case that A is a registered release and A is enrolled in the release wave and B is available
I can only prepare stage for a release A using a validation artifact B if it is not the case that A is prepared for the release stage
effects: Once I prepare stage for a release A using a validation artifact B, it is the case that A is prepared for the release stage and A requires migration before release
Once I prepare stage for a release A using a validation artifact B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

run_validation_suite_for_group.description: run a validation suite C for a deployment group B on a release A
preconditions: I can only run a validation suite C for a deployment group B on a release A if it is the case that A is prepared for the release stage and A is enrolled in the release wave and A is bound to the deployment group B and C is available
I can only run a validation suite C for a deployment group B on a release A if it is not the case that A is validated for release
effects: Once I run a validation suite C for a deployment group B on a release A, it is the case that A is validated for release
Once I run a validation suite C for a deployment group B on a release A, it is not the case anymore that A requires migration before release

run_validation_by_policy.description: run validation for a release A using an approval policy B
preconditions: I can only run validation for a release A using an approval policy B if it is the case that A is enrolled in the release wave and A has the release policy applied from B
I can only run validation for a release A using an approval policy B if it is not the case that A is validated for release
effects: Once I run validation for a release A using an approval policy B, it is the case that A is validated for release
Once I run validation for a release A using an approval policy B, it is not the case anymore that A requires migration before release

enroll_component_dependency.description: enroll a release A with component dependency a service component B
preconditions: I can only enroll a release A with component dependency a service component B if it is the case that A is a registered release and B is available and A is compatible with the service component B
effects: Once I enroll a release A with component dependency a service component B, it is the case that A is bound to the component B
Once I enroll a release A with component dependency a service component B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unenroll_component_dependency.description: unenroll a release A from component dependency a service component B
preconditions: I can only unenroll a release A from component dependency a service component B if it is the case that A is bound to the component B
effects: Once I unenroll a release A from component dependency a service component B, it is the case that B is available
Once I unenroll a release A from component dependency a service component B, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the component B

enroll_service_dependency.description: enroll a release A in service dependency a dependent service B
preconditions: I can only enroll a release A in service dependency a dependent service B if it is the case that A is a registered release and B is available and A is compatible with the service B
effects: Once I enroll a release A in service dependency a dependent service B, it is the case that A is bound to the service B
Once I enroll a release A in service dependency a dependent service B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unenroll_service_dependency.description: unenroll a release A from service dependency a dependent service B
preconditions: I can only unenroll a release A from service dependency a dependent service B if it is the case that A is bound to the service B
effects: Once I unenroll a release A from service dependency a dependent service B, it is the case that B is available
Once I unenroll a release A from service dependency a dependent service B, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the service B

enroll_toggle_dependency.description: enroll a release A with toggle dependency a feature toggle B
preconditions: I can only enroll a release A with toggle dependency a feature toggle B if it is the case that A is a registered release and B is available and A is compatible with the feature toggle B
effects: Once I enroll a release A with toggle dependency a feature toggle B, it is the case that A is bound to the toggle B
Once I enroll a release A with toggle dependency a feature toggle B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unenroll_toggle_dependency.description: unenroll a release A from toggle dependency a feature toggle B
preconditions: I can only unenroll a release A from toggle dependency a feature toggle B if it is the case that A is bound to the toggle B
effects: Once I unenroll a release A from toggle dependency a feature toggle B, it is the case that B is available
Once I unenroll a release A from toggle dependency a feature toggle B, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the toggle B

enroll_integration_dependency.description: enroll a release A in integration dependency an integration bundle B
preconditions: I can only enroll a release A in integration dependency an integration bundle B if it is the case that A is a registered release and B is available and A is compatible with the integration bundle B
effects: Once I enroll a release A in integration dependency an integration bundle B, it is the case that A is bound to the integration bundle B
Once I enroll a release A in integration dependency an integration bundle B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unenroll_integration_dependency.description: unenroll a release A from integration dependency an integration bundle B
preconditions: I can only unenroll a release A from integration dependency an integration bundle B if it is the case that A is bound to the integration bundle B
effects: Once I unenroll a release A from integration dependency an integration bundle B, it is the case that B is available
Once I unenroll a release A from integration dependency an integration bundle B, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the integration bundle B

execute_integration_validation.description: execute integration validation for a release A in a target environment B with a service component C and a dependent service D
preconditions: I can only execute integration validation for a release A in a target environment B with a service component C and a dependent service D if it is the case that A is enrolled in the release wave and A is bound to the component C and A is bound to the service D and B is available and A is compatible with the target environment B
I can only execute integration validation for a release A in a target environment B with a service component C and a dependent service D if it is not the case that A is promotable
effects: Once I execute integration validation for a release A in a target environment B with a service component C and a dependent service D, it is the case that A is targeted for the environment B and A is promotable
Once I execute integration validation for a release A in a target environment B with a service component C and a dependent service D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

execute_integration_with_migration.description: execute integration with migration for a release A in a target environment B using a feature toggle C and a migration job D
preconditions: I can only execute integration with migration for a release A in a target environment B using a feature toggle C and a migration job D if it is the case that A is enrolled in the release wave and A is bound to the toggle C and D is available and B is available and A is compatible with the target environment B and A is compatible with the migration job D
I can only execute integration with migration for a release A in a target environment B using a feature toggle C and a migration job D if it is not the case that A is promotable
effects: Once I execute integration with migration for a release A in a target environment B using a feature toggle C and a migration job D, it is the case that A is targeted for the environment B and A is promotable and A has pending checks and A requires migration before release

Once I execute integration with migration for a release A in a target environment B using a feature toggle C and a migration job D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

clear_pending_checks.description: clear pending checks for a release A with a service component B and a dependent service C
preconditions: I can only clear pending checks for a release A with a service component B and a dependent service C if it is the case that A is promotable and A has pending checks and A is bound to the component B and A is bound to the service C
effects: Once I clear pending checks for a release A with a service component B and a dependent service C, it is not the case anymore that A has pending checks and it is not the case anymore that A requires migration before release

mark_release_approved_by_operator.description: mark a release A as approved by an operator role D for a service component B and a dependent service C
preconditions: I can only mark a release A as approved by an operator role D for a service component B and a dependent service C if it is the case that A is validated for release and A is promotable and A is bound to the component B and A is bound to the service C and A is applicable to the infrastructure profile D

I can only mark a release A as approved by an operator role D for a service component B and a dependent service C if it is not the case that A requires migration before release and it is not the case that A is approved
effects: Once I mark a release A as approved by an operator role D for a service component B and a dependent service C, it is the case that A is approved

mark_release_approved_by_stakeholder.description: mark a release A as approved by a stakeholder role D for a feature toggle B and an integration bundle C
preconditions: I can only mark a release A as approved by a stakeholder role D for a feature toggle B and an integration bundle C if it is the case that A is validated for release and A is promotable and A is bound to the toggle B and A is bound to the integration bundle C and A is applicable to the infrastructure profile D
I can only mark a release A as approved by a stakeholder role D for a feature toggle B and an integration bundle C if it is not the case that A is approved
effects: Once I mark a release A as approved by a stakeholder role D for a feature toggle B and an integration bundle C, it is the case that A is approved and A requires migration before release

promote_release_after_approval.description: promote a release A after approval for a service component B and a dependent service C
preconditions: I can only promote a release A after approval for a service component B and a dependent service C if it is the case that A is approved and A requires migration before release and A is bound to the component B and A is bound to the service C
effects: Once I promote a release A after approval for a service component B and a dependent service C, it is the case that A has been promoted

Once I promote a release A after approval for a service component B and a dependent service C, it is not the case anymore that A requires migration before release and it is not the case anymore that A is validated for release and it is not the case anymore that A has pending checks

revalidate_group_after_promotion.description: revalidate a deployment group B after promotion of a release A using a validation suite C
preconditions: I can only revalidate a deployment group B after promotion of a release A using a validation suite C if it is the case that A has been promoted and A is approved and A is enrolled in the release wave and A is bound to the deployment group B and C is available
I can only revalidate a deployment group B after promotion of a release A using a validation suite C if it is not the case that A is validated for release
effects: Once I revalidate a deployment group B after promotion of a release A using a validation suite C, it is the case that A is validated for release

prepare_policy_eligibility_for_group.description: prepare policy eligibility for a deployment group B with a release A
preconditions: I can only prepare policy eligibility for a deployment group B with a release A if it is the case that A is approved and A is validated for release and A is bound to the deployment group B

I can only prepare policy eligibility for a deployment group B with a release A if it is not the case that A requires migration before release and it is not the case that A is eligible for release policy
effects: Once I prepare policy eligibility for a deployment group B with a release A, it is the case that A is eligible for release policy

prepare_policy_eligibility_with_artifact.description: prepare policy eligibility for a release A using a validation artifact B
preconditions: I can only prepare policy eligibility for a release A using a validation artifact B if it is the case that A is approved and A is validated for release and B is available

I can only prepare policy eligibility for a release A using a validation artifact B if it is not the case that A requires migration before release and it is not the case that A is eligible for release policy
effects: Once I prepare policy eligibility for a release A using a validation artifact B, it is the case that A is eligible for release policy
Once I prepare policy eligibility for a release A using a validation artifact B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

bind_policy_to_variant.description: bind an approval policy B to the variant of a release A
preconditions: I can only bind an approval policy B to the variant of a release A if it is the case that A is eligible for release policy and B is available and B is applicable to the release A
effects: Once I bind an approval policy B to the variant of a release A, it is the case that the variant of A is linked to the approval policy B
Once I bind an approval policy B to the variant of a release A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

apply_policy_to_anchor_linkage.description: apply an approval policy C to the anchor linkage of a release anchor A and a release variant B
preconditions: I can only apply an approval policy C to the anchor linkage of a release anchor A and a release variant B if it is the case that A is a registered release and the release anchor for A is registered and A has a policy anchor binding to C and the variant of B is linked to the approval policy C
I can only apply an approval policy C to the anchor linkage of a release anchor A and a release variant B if it is not the case that A has the release policy applied from C
effects: Once I apply an approval policy C to the anchor linkage of a release anchor A and a release variant B, it is the case that A has the release policy applied from C

mark_release_ready_for_rollout.description: mark a release A as ready for rollout in a deployment group B using a validation suite C
preconditions: I can only mark a release A as ready for rollout in a deployment group B using a validation suite C if it is the case that A is a registered release and the release anchor for A is registered and A is validated for release and A is eligible for release policy and A is bound to the deployment group B and C is available
I can only mark a release A as ready for rollout in a deployment group B using a validation suite C if it is not the case that A is ready for the release stage
effects: Once I mark a release A as ready for rollout in a deployment group B using a validation suite C, it is the case that A is ready for the release stage

finalize_release_without_policy.description: finalize a release A without policy
preconditions: I can only finalize a release A without policy if it is the case that the variant of A is selected and A is a registered release and A is enrolled in the release wave and A is promotable and A is approved and A is eligible for release policy and A is validated for release
I can only finalize a release A without policy if it is not the case that A has been finalized for release
effects: Once I finalize a release A without policy, it is the case that A has been finalized for release

finalize_release_with_policy.description: finalize a release A with an approval policy B
preconditions: I can only finalize a release A with an approval policy B if it is the case that the release anchor for A is registered and A is a registered release and A is enrolled in the release wave and A is promotable and A is approved and A is eligible for release policy and A is validated for release and A has the release policy applied from B
I can only finalize a release A with an approval policy B if it is not the case that A has been finalized for release
effects: Once I finalize a release A with an approval policy B, it is the case that A has been finalized for release

finalize_release_with_variant_ready.description: finalize a release A with variant ready
preconditions: I can only finalize a release A with variant ready if it is the case that the release anchor for A is registered and A is a registered release and A is enrolled in the release wave and A is promotable and A is approved and A is eligible for release policy and A is validated for release and A is ready for the release stage
I can only finalize a release A with variant ready if it is not the case that A has been finalized for release
effects: Once I finalize a release A with variant ready, it is the case that A has been finalized for release

action_nl_templates.register_release: register release {?release} as a registered release
action_nl_templates.prepare_stage_for_group: prepare stage for release {?release} in deployment group {?deployment_group}
action_nl_templates.prepare_stage_with_validation_artifact: prepare stage for release {?release} using validation artifact {?validation_artifact}
action_nl_templates.run_validation_suite_for_group: run validation suite {?validation_suite} for deployment group {?deployment_group} on release {?release}
action_nl_templates.run_validation_by_policy: run validation for release {?release} using approval policy {?approval_policy}
action_nl_templates.enroll_component_dependency: enroll release {?release} with component dependency service component {?service_component}
action_nl_templates.unenroll_component_dependency: unenroll release {?release} from component dependency service component {?service_component}
action_nl_templates.enroll_service_dependency: enroll release {?release} in service dependency dependent service {?dependent_service}
action_nl_templates.unenroll_service_dependency: unenroll release {?release} from service dependency dependent service {?dependent_service}
action_nl_templates.enroll_toggle_dependency: enroll release {?release} with toggle dependency feature toggle {?feature_toggle}
action_nl_templates.unenroll_toggle_dependency: unenroll release {?release} from toggle dependency feature toggle {?feature_toggle}
action_nl_templates.enroll_integration_dependency: enroll release {?release} in integration dependency integration bundle {?integration_bundle}
action_nl_templates.unenroll_integration_dependency: unenroll release {?release} from integration dependency integration bundle {?integration_bundle}
action_nl_templates.execute_integration_validation: execute integration validation for release {?release} in target environment {?target_environment} with service component {?service_component} and dependent service {?dependent_service}
action_nl_templates.execute_integration_with_migration: execute integration with migration for release {?release} in target environment {?target_environment} using feature toggle {?feature_toggle} and migration job {?migration_job}
action_nl_templates.clear_pending_checks: clear pending checks for release {?release} with service component {?service_component} and dependent service {?dependent_service}
action_nl_templates.mark_release_approved_by_operator: mark release {?release} as approved by operator role {?operator_role} for service component {?service_component} and dependent service {?dependent_service}
action_nl_templates.mark_release_approved_by_stakeholder: mark release {?release} as approved by stakeholder role {?stakeholder_role} for feature toggle {?feature_toggle} and integration bundle {?integration_bundle}
action_nl_templates.promote_release_after_approval: promote release {?release} after approval for service component {?service_component} and dependent service {?dependent_service}
action_nl_templates.revalidate_group_after_promotion: revalidate deployment group {?deployment_group} after promotion of release {?release} using validation suite {?validation_suite}
action_nl_templates.prepare_policy_eligibility_for_group: prepare policy eligibility for deployment group {?deployment_group} with release {?release}
action_nl_templates.prepare_policy_eligibility_with_artifact: prepare policy eligibility for release {?release} using validation artifact {?validation_artifact}
action_nl_templates.bind_policy_to_variant: bind approval policy {?approval_policy} to the variant of release {?release}
action_nl_templates.apply_policy_to_anchor_linkage: apply approval policy {?approval_policy} to the anchor linkage of release anchor {?release_anchor} and release variant {?release_variant}
action_nl_templates.mark_release_ready_for_rollout: mark release {?release} as ready for rollout in deployment group {?deployment_group} using validation suite {?validation_suite}

predicate_nl_templates.release_wave_enrolled: {?release} is enrolled in the release wave
predicate_nl_templates.release_stage_prepared: {?release} is prepared for the release stage
predicate_nl_templates.release_bound_integration: {?release} is bound to the integration bundle {?integration_bundle}
predicate_nl_templates.release_policy_anchor_binding: {?release} has a policy anchor binding to {?approval_policy}
predicate_nl_templates.release_policy_applied: {?release} has the release policy applied from {?approval_policy}
predicate_nl_templates.release_stage_ready: {?release} is ready for the release stage
predicate_nl_templates.release_compatible_with_wave: {?release} is compatible with the deployment wave {?deployment_wave}
predicate_nl_templates.release_compatible_with_environment: {?release} is compatible with the target environment {?target_environment}
predicate_nl_templates.release_compatible_with_component: {?release} is compatible with the service component {?service_component}
predicate_nl_templates.release_compatible_with_toggle: {?release} is compatible with the feature toggle {?feature_toggle}
predicate_nl_templates.release_compatible_with_migration: {?release} is compatible with the migration job {?migration_job}
predicate_nl_templates.release_compatible_with_integration: {?release} is compatible with the integration bundle {?integration_bundle}
predicate_nl_templates.release_applicable_to_infra_profile: {?release} is applicable to the infrastructure profile {?infrastructure_profile}
predicate_nl_templates.variant_linked_approval_policy: the variant of {?release} is linked to the approval policy {?approval_policy}
predicate_nl_templates.release_anchor_registered: the release anchor for {?release} is registered
predicate_nl_templates.release_bound_group: {?release} is bound to the deployment group {?deployment_group}

action_nl_templates_indef.register_release: register a release {?release} as a registered release
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_release_to_wave: assign a release {?release} to a deployment wave {?deployment_wave}
action_nl_templates_indef.revoke_release_from_wave: revoke a release {?release} from a deployment wave {?deployment_wave}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_release_to_deployment_group: bind a release {?release} to a deployment group {?deployment_group}
action_nl_templates_indef.unbind_release_from_deployment_group: unbind a release {?release} from a deployment group {?deployment_group}
action_nl_templates_indef.prepare_stage_for_group: prepare stage for a release {?release} in a deployment group {?deployment_group}
action_nl_templates_indef.prepare_stage_with_validation_artifact: prepare stage for a release {?release} using a validation artifact {?validation_artifact}
action_nl_templates_indef.run_validation_suite_for_group: run a validation suite {?validation_suite} for a deployment group {?deployment_group} on a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.run_validation_by_policy: run validation for a release {?release} using an approval policy {?approval_policy}
action_nl_templates_indef.enroll_component_dependency: enroll a release {?release} with component dependency a service component {?service_component}
action_nl_templates_indef.unenroll_component_dependency: unenroll a release {?release} from component dependency a service component {?service_component}
action_nl_templates_indef.enroll_service_dependency: enroll a release {?release} in service dependency a dependent service {?dependent_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.unenroll_service_dependency: unenroll a release {?release} from service dependency a dependent service {?dependent_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.enroll_toggle_dependency: enroll a release {?release} with toggle dependency a feature toggle {?feature_toggle}
action_nl_templates_indef.unenroll_toggle_dependency: unenroll a release {?release} from toggle dependency a feature toggle {?feature_toggle}
action_nl_templates_indef.enroll_integration_dependency: enroll a release {?release} in integration dependency an integration bundle {?integration_bundle}
action_nl_templates_indef.unenroll_integration_dependency: unenroll a release {?release} from integration dependency an integration bundle {?integration_bundle}
action_nl_templates_indef.execute_integration_validation: execute integration validation for a release {?release} in a target environment {?target_environment} with a service component {?service_component} and a dependent service {?dependent_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.execute_integration_with_migration: execute integration with migration for a release {?release} in a target environment {?target_environment} using a feature toggle {?feature_toggle} and a migration job {?migration_job}
action_nl_templates_indef.clear_pending_checks: clear pending checks for a release {?release} with a service component {?service_component} and a dependent service {?dependent_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_release_approved_by_operator: mark a release {?release} as approved by an operator role {?operator_role} for a service component {?service_component} and a dependent service {?dependent_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_release_approved_by_stakeholder: mark a release {?release} as approved by a stakeholder role {?stakeholder_role} for a feature toggle {?feature_toggle} and an integration bundle {?integration_bundle}
action_nl_templates_indef.promote_release_after_approval: promote a release {?release} after approval for a service component {?service_component} and a dependent service {?dependent_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.revalidate_group_after_promotion: revalidate a deployment group {?deployment_group} after promotion of a release {?release} using a validation suite {?validation_suite}
action_nl_templates_indef.prepare_policy_eligibility_for_group: prepare policy eligibility for a deployment group {?deployment_group} with a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.prepare_policy_eligibility_with_artifact: prepare policy eligibility for a release {?release} using a validation artifact {?validation_artifact}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_policy_to_variant: bind an approval policy {?approval_policy} to the variant of a release {?release}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_policy_to_anchor_linkage: apply an approval policy {?approval_policy} to the anchor linkage of a release anchor {?release_anchor} and a release variant {?release_variant}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_release_ready_for_rollout: mark a release {?release} as ready for rollout in a deployment group {?deployment_group} using a validation suite {?validation_suite}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_release_with_policy: finalize a release {?release} with an approval policy {?approval_policy}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_release_with_variant_ready: finalize a release {?release} with variant ready

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a release or a deployment wave or a target environment or a dependent service or a service component or a feature toggle or a deployment group or a validation artifact or a approval policy or a validation suite or a migration job or a integration bundle or a infrastructure profile is also a object
Everything that is a operator role or a stakeholder role is also a infrastructure profile
Everything that is a release variant or a release anchor is also a release
